evals.prompt: Write a script that runs a YOLO object detection model on the camera feed and prints the confidence of the first detected object.
evals.expected_output: A script using MLComponent to run a model and parse output tensors.
expectations: Calls mlComponent.run() or listens for OnFinished callback
Supports async inference pattern to maintain frame rate

evals.prompt: Create a logic that feeds a 256x256 cropped camera texture into an ML model and logs the top prediction index.
evals.expected_output: A script using CropTextureProvider to preprocess input for SnapML.
expectations: Uses Asset.CropTextureProvider to handle the crop
Implements a Softmax or ArgMax logic to find the top index
